action.reasoning: Observation: 20 epochs gave R2=0.5126, big jump from 0.30. ptend_q is still bottleneck (0.31). Analysis: model needs more capacity and longer training. With ~3.8h left and 23s/epoch, I can do 60-80 epochs. Let me try a bigger model (hidden=1536, depth=10) and more epochs. Decision: scale up architecture and run 50 epochs. Should take ~25 min.
action.command: EPOCHS=50 HIDDEN=1536 DEPTH=10 LR=8e-4 python train.py
